name: MiniFarm 2020
short_description: MiniFarm 2020 is a unique mix of citybuilding and farming.
detailed_description:
Check Out Other Games



About the Game




MiniFarm 2020 is a unique mix of citybuilding and farming. Build your dream village consisting of houses, farms, factories, community buildings and a seaside trading port. Manage the farm and village productions in your fun cartoon farming town, sell goods to further develop and expand your farm!

Explore the farming and gardening world earn money and keep expanding!

Game features:
- There are dozens of levels to get through from simple to more advanced one
- Grow crops, sell products, and use the proceeds to develop a community
- Assemble a collection of unique animals and natural phenomena
